meta.title: ski.svgn.org — Ski Run Card
meta.description: Upload a ski app screenshot and generate your shareable run card.

home.title: Ski Run Card
home.subtitle: Upload a ski app screenshot to auto-generate your personal run card. You can also upload a photo to create a shareable image.
home.manualHint: Manual entry when parsing fails or you want full control.
home.manualDesc: You’ll be taken to the preview page after submit.
home.aiShareDesc: Upload your photo to generate a shareable image with your stats overlay.
home.aiSharePhotoHint: Stats will be overlaid onto your photo
home.aiShareFreeHint: 1 free use per day (watermarked). Sign in & buy credits for watermark-free.
home.aiShareContentErr: Photo content not allowed. Please use a different photo.

result.title: Preview
result.subtitle: Left: vector card with your theme and aspect ratio. Below: optional paid-style AI image. Right: edit multi-run data for the day.
result.mobileHint: Tap Download to save directly to your photos.
result.aiShareDesc: Generate a portrait share graphic from your stats. Optional: upload your own photo and the data will be overlaid on it.
result.aiShareFreeHint: 1 free use per day (watermarked). Sign in & buy credits for watermark-free.
result.aiShareContentErr: Photo content not allowed. Please use a different photo.
result.aiSharePhotoHint: Stats will be overlaid onto your photo

upload.dropTitle: Drop a screenshot here, or click to upload
upload.errType: Please upload JPG, PNG, or WEBP

form.descDefault: Multi-run day summary; theme and export size are rendered locally (no API).
form.descManual: You’ll go to the preview page after submit.

auth.title: Sign in
auth.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a magic link to sign in.
auth.checkEmailHint: We sent a sign-in link. Click it to log in.
auth.noCredits: No credits left. Please purchase more.
